requirements.title: PID parity bit P0
requirements.description: protect_id must compute P0 = ID0 XOR ID1 XOR ID2 XOR ID4

requirements.title: PID parity bit P1
requirements.description: protect_id must compute P1 = NOT(ID1 XOR ID3 XOR ID4 XOR ID5)

requirements.title: Classic checksum covers data only
requirements.description: calc_checksum in Classic mode sums data bytes only (no PID)

requirements.title: Enhanced checksum covers PID plus data
requirements.description: calc_checksum in Enhanced mode sums PID byte plus all data bytes

requirements.title: Carry-around addition
requirements.description: Checksum sum uses carry-around: when sum exceeds 0xFF subtract 0xFF (not 0x100)

requirements.title: Checksum inversion
requirements.description: Final checksum byte is bitwise inverted: result = 0xFF - sum

requirements.title: Frame ID range
requirements.description: Frame ID must be in range 0x00..=0x3F; validate_frame rejects id > 0x3F

requirements.title: Frame data length
requirements.description: Frame data length must be 1 to 8 bytes inclusive

requirements.title: Diagnostic frames require ClassicChecksum
requirements.description: Frames with ID 0x3C or 0x3D must use ClassicChecksum; enhanced is rejected

requirements.title: validate_frame enforces all invariants
requirements.description: validate_frame checks id range, data non-empty, data length ≤ 8, diagnostic checksum type

requirements.title: publish stores slave response
requirements.description: Bus::publish stores data keyed by id; does not broadcast to subscribers

requirements.title: send_header drives frame exchange
requirements.description: MasterBus::send_header computes PID, checksum, validates, and broadcasts to subscribers

requirements.title: set_schedule validates entry IDs
requirements.description: set_schedule rejects any entry with id > 0x3F

requirements.title: NoResponse returned when no slave response registered
requirements.description: send_header returns Error::NoResponse when no response is registered for the requested id

requirements.title: verify_pid rejects incorrect parity
requirements.description: verify_pid returns Err(InvalidFrame) when parity bits in pid do not match computed values

requirements.title: FrameReceiver returns None after close
requirements.description: FrameReceiver::recv returns None once the bus or the receiver is closed

requirements.title: Back-pressure must not block bus sender
requirements.description: When subscriber queue is full, frames are dropped (DropNewest or DropOldest) rather than blocking send_header

requirements.title: Bus close is idempotent
requirements.description: Calling Bus::close more than once returns Ok without error

requirements.title: to_message sets protocol = 3
requirements.description: RELAY adapter to_message must set Message::protocol = Protocol::Lin (3)

requirements.title: from_message rejects wrong protocol
requirements.description: RELAY adapter from_message returns Err(InvalidFrame) when Message::protocol != Lin

requirements.title: NoResponse kind maps to Timeout
requirements.description: Error::NoResponse::kind() must return relay::Error::Timeout (ErrNoResponse IS Timeout)

requirements.title: VirtualBus publish stores SlaveResponse
requirements.description: VirtualBus::publish stores data with Enhanced checksum type by default

requirements.title: VirtualBus publish_classic stores SlaveResponse with Classic type
requirements.description: VirtualBus::publish_classic stores data with Classic checksum type

requirements.title: VirtualBus send_header broadcasts to matching subscribers
requirements.description: send_header delivers frame to all active subscribers whose filters match

requirements.title: VirtualBus metrics tracking
requirements.description: VirtualBus tracks published, delivered, and dropped frame counts atomically

requirements.title: VirtualBus health reporting
requirements.description: VirtualBus::health returns HealthStatus::Healthy when open, HealthStatus::Unhealthy when closed

requirements.title: VirtualBus subscribe returns FrameReceiver
requirements.description: subscribe creates a SubInner and returns a FrameReceiver; the receiver receives frames broadcast by send_header

requirements.title: VirtualBus filter semantics
requirements.description: A subscriber with empty filters receives all frames; a subscriber with filters receives only matching frames

requirements.title: VirtualBus publish None removes slave response
requirements.description: Publishing None for an id removes any existing slave response for that id

requirements.title: VirtualBus set_schedule validates IDs
requirements.description: set_schedule on VirtualBus rejects any entry with id > 0x3F

requirements.title: VirtualBus concurrent safety
requirements.description: Multiple concurrent send_header calls must not race or corrupt state

requirements.title: VirtualBus back-pressure DropOldest
requirements.description: When a subscriber queue is full with DropOldest policy, the oldest frame is dropped and the new frame is enqueued

requirements.title: VirtualBus back-pressure DropNewest
requirements.description: When a subscriber queue is full with DropNewest policy, the new frame is dropped and the queue is unchanged

requirements.title: MasterNode set_schedule validates non-empty
requirements.description: MasterNode::set_schedule rejects an empty schedule with InvalidFrame error

requirements.title: MasterNode set_schedule validates ID range
requirements.description: MasterNode::set_schedule rejects any entry with id > 0x3F

requirements.title: MasterNode run executes schedule loop
requirements.description: MasterNode::run iterates schedule entries, calls send_header for each, invokes on_frame or on_error callbacks

requirements.title: MasterNode run respects context cancellation
requirements.description: MasterNode::run exits its loop when ctx.done() returns true

requirements.title: MasterNode run invokes on_error for NoResponse
requirements.description: When send_header returns NoResponse, run invokes on_error(id, Error::NoResponse)

requirements.title: Oversized payload rejected
requirements.description: Data longer than 8 bytes is rejected by validate_frame

requirements.title: Invalid PID rejected
requirements.description: verify_pid rejects PIDs with mismatched parity bits

requirements.title: ID overflow rejected
requirements.description: Frame IDs > 0x3F are rejected by validate_frame and send_header
